PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MICHAEL SHINTAKU, CSR #8251. TELEPHONE: 408-410-8090. EMAIL: EMAILFORMIKE@HOTMAIL.COM. JUDGE: GERARDO C. SANDOVAL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COHERUS BIOSCIENCER, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ITHINKEVENTS LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY GALLAGHER, GARRETH AN INDIVIDUAL $173,891.38 PRINCIPAL, $18,619.75 INTEREST, $1,775.85 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $194,286.98, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-17-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-06-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants ITHINKEVENTS LLC, a California limited liability Company, and Garreth Gallagher, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8090. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Mahmoud A. Fadli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Coherus Biosciencer, Inc.
Heather Zimmerman, a witness for and corporate counsel of plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Valarie Valrey, as Personal Representative of the Estate of Howard Simpson, Deceased, and Valarie Valrey and Gerald Simpson, as Legal Heirs of Howard Simpson, Deceased. Louis Dupont, and against the Defaulted Defendant Stan Flowers Company, Inc., as follows:

Economic Damages - $541,463.89.
Non-Economic Damages - $11,000,000.00.
Total - $11,541,463.89.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
